task: Plot on the bottom-right subplot of a 2x2 grid
error_location: line 2: axes[1][2] is out of bounds; should be axes[1][1]
clarification_query: In a 2x2 subplot grid, what index accesses the bottom-right subplot?
explanation: A 2x2 grid has indices 0 and 1 in each dimension. axes[1][2] raises IndexError; bottom-right is axes[1][1].
